Onward purchase & remortgage

Completion Plan

This page tracks progress on remortgaging the Southend flat, buying our onward property, and down-selecting candidate properties while tracking their viewings. Tap any bar or diamond to update it, or add new tasks and milestones as things change. You'll need to sign into your Google account in order for any changes to persist.
